title: Article 35 Order No. 1 of 2009 on FALCON Submarine Cable Landing Station Access
summary: Addresses access to landing station equipment at Batelco’s Salmanya complex for international connectivity.

theme_notes.telecom_digital_infrastructure.cloud_dat: Order concerning access to FALCON submarine cable landing station.
